features.title: Everything you need to
features.aiVoiceDesc: Reads chat comments with premium natural voices. No delays, no interruptions.
features.smartFilterDesc: Filters spam and prioritizes the most relevant comments automatically.
features.multiVoiceDesc: Assign different voices based on user type: donors, moderators, followers.
features.voiceCloneDesc: Create your own personalized AI voice in minutes.
features.analyticsDesc: Monitor messages, tokens used and stream performance.
features.multiLangDesc: Support for multiple languages and regional settings.

items.name: @alexgamertok
items.text: Before, if I stayed quiet for 30 seconds the Live would die alone. With Stream Voicer the chat has a life of its own: viewers read, comment and stay even when I'm focused on the game.

items.name: @sofiaart
items.text: I don't have to be reading comments all the time. Stream Voicer processes them, highlights the best ones and keeps the conversation flowing. I just focus on creating content and the chat takes care of itself.

items.name: @carlosmusica.live
items.text: My Lives now have 3x more engagement without me doing anything different. People comment more because they know their messages will be valued. It's incredible how much interaction it generates without extra effort.

items.name: @dianabeauty_tk
items.text: Every comment that arrives turns into real participation. It's no longer just "lol" at the bottom, now comments generate conversation. My community feels heard and that attracts more people to the Live.

items.name: @javierstreamer22
items.text: The system automatically recognizes my followers and donors. I don't have to waste time giving them manual shout-outs. They feel valued naturally and that generates more donations and subscriptions for me.

items.name: @mariacomedy_tk
items.benefit: 🚀 Make your stream dynamic without talking more
items.text: My Live is much more dynamic and entertaining without having to be talking all the time to keep attention. The chat is so active and valued that people come for the community, not just for me.

faq.title: ❓ Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Resolve your doubts about Stream Voicer

items.a: Stream Voicer reads your TikTok LIVE chat messages in real time and plays them with voice to maintain constant interaction in your stream.
1 token equals 1 character generated. Consumption applies when using premium or custom voices.
Premium voices and custom voices consume tokens. The essential voice does not consume tokens.

items.q: Are tokens charged if audio comes from cache?
items.a: Yes. Cache optimizes performance and internal processing costs, but user token consumption is maintained based on characters generated in premium/custom voices.

items.q: What do I do if I run out of tokens?
items.a: You can top up instantly from the Token Top-Up section. If you have no tokens, premium/custom voices stop playing until you recharge.

items.q: How does the FREE plan work?
items.a: The FREE plan includes 1 essential voice with 2 daily hours. The counter resets every 24 hours.

items.q: Can I change or cancel my plan anytime?
items.a: Yes. Upgrades apply immediately with proportional adjustment for remaining cycle time. Downgrades apply on the next cycle. You can cancel anytime.

items.q: Does it work with other languages?
items.a: Stream Voicer is currently optimized for Spanish. More languages will be integrated soon.

items.q: How long does it take to process a message?
items.a: Processed in real time. Usually 1 to 5 seconds depending on message length, chosen voice and system load.
Yes. Only the necessary access is used to read public activity of your LIVE. We don't share your data with third parties.
Yes. You can start with FREE and upgrade to START, CREATOR or PRO when you need more capacity and more voices.

items.q: Can I create and edit my custom voices?
items.a: Yes. You can manage custom voices from your panel. The available amount depends on your active plan.

howItWorks.title: Enjoy
howItWorks.description: Messages are read automatically during your stream

advancedGuide.title: Smart filter (simply put)
advancedGuide.description: When chat moves fast, it prioritizes messages with conversation value and reduces noise (spam, repeated, pure emoji or hard-to-read text). When chat slows, it opens more coverage to read more useful messages.

advancedGuide.title: Live AI assistant
advancedGuide.description: The assistant takes recent chat context to respond in your stream's tone. You can trigger it manually or with interaction rules to balance frequency, naturalness and control.

advancedGuide.title: Tokens and real consumption
advancedGuide.description: Premium and custom voices consume tokens per generated character. The FREE plan's essential voice doesn't consume tokens, but maintains its daily usage window for stability and cost management.

advancedGuide.title: Roles and reading priority
advancedGuide.description: You can give preference to moderators, subscribers, community and donors. You can also force only questions or combine them with other filters to keep chat focused.

advancedGuide.title: Startup recommendation
advancedGuide.description: Start with basic filters: skip repeated, ignore links and minimum length. Then adjust voices by role (e.g. donors/questions) and increase aggressiveness only if chat volume demands it.

advancedGuide.title: How to evaluate if it's well configured
advancedGuide.description: Use the session summary: if message quality improves without losing live pace, you're on track. Adjust gradually to maintain the balance between quantity, clarity and engagement.

questions.q: How do I start using the platform?
questions.a: Sign in, enter the Studio, connect your TikTok LIVE username, choose a voice and activate reading.

questions.q: What does the smart filter do?
questions.a: Prioritizes useful messages and reduces noise like spam, links, repeated, empty or hard to read messages.

questions.q: Does the smart filter change based on chat pace?
questions.a: Yes. When chat is fast it filters more; when slow it allows more messages through.

questions.q: What is a token?
questions.a: 1 token equals 1 character generated in premium or custom voices.

questions.q: Which voices consume tokens?
questions.a: Premium and custom voices. Essential voice doesn't consume tokens.

questions.q: What happens if I run out of tokens?
questions.a: If tokens don't suffice for premium or custom voice, it switches to essential voice.

questions.q: How does the FREE plan work?
questions.a: Includes essential voice with 2 daily hours. Counter resets every 24 hours.

questions.q: How to create a custom voice?
questions.a: Go to Voice Workshop, upload a voice sample, generate the voice, test it and assign it.

questions.q: How many cloned voices can I delete per day?
questions.a: On Start plan you can delete up to 3 voices per day. On Creator and Pro, up to 6 per day.

questions.q: How to upload ideal audio for voice cloning?
questions.a: Use clear voice, no noise or background music. Recommended: 10 to 15 seconds. Better audio quality means better cloning result.

questions.q: What are the Extractor Pro limits?
questions.a: Creator: 4 uses per day. Pro: 7 uses per day. Resets every 24 hours.

questions.q: AI Assistant: what is it for?
questions.a: Uses recent chat context to answer short questions with the personality and voice you configure.

questions.q: AI Assistant: which plan is it available on?
questions.a: Available on Pro Plan only.

questions.q: Can I configure the assistant's tone and frequency?
questions.a: Yes. You can adjust frequency, tone and response length.

questions.q: How do I know if my configuration is working well?
questions.a: Check session summary: messages received, read, filtered and overall LIVE pace.

questions.q: LIVE won't connect, what do I check first?
questions.a: Verify exact TikTok username, confirm LIVE is active and try reconnecting.

questions.q: No audio, what do I check?
questions.a: Validate panel volume, browser audio output and that it's not paused.

questions.q: How to mute someone's voice?
questions.a: In the chat panel, open user moderation and add them to the silenced/banned list.

questions.q: How to unblock someone from voice silencing?
questions.a: Go to session moderation list, find the user and remove from silence/ban.

questions.q: How to change a user's nickname?
questions.a: In the nicks section, select the user, type the new name and save.

questions.q: Can I change or cancel my plan anytime?
questions.a: Yes. You can update, change or cancel from your account.

questions.q: Can I change plans anytime?
questions.a: Yes, you can change plans anytime from your account settings.

questions.q: What happens if I upgrade?
questions.a: The change applies immediately and you only pay the proportional difference for remaining time in your billing cycle.

questions.q: What happens if I downgrade?
questions.a: The change will apply at the start of the next billing cycle. Until then you keep enjoying your current plan.

questions.q: Can I cancel my plan anytime?
questions.a: Yes, you can cancel anytime. You'll keep access until the end of the paid period.

questions.q: Can I request a refund?
questions.a: Only within the first 24-48 hours from purchase. After that no refund applies.

questions.q: Can I get a refund if I already used the service?
questions.a: Not if the service was used significantly during that period.

questions.q: Is there an alternative to a refund?
questions.a: In some cases we can offer internal credit for future cycles. Contact us to evaluate.

questions.q: Is the TikTok connection secure?
questions.a: Yes. Only necessary access is used to read public activity of your LIVE.

questions.q: Which language works best currently?
questions.a: Currently optimized for Spanish.

cookies.title: 🍪 COOKIE POLICY
cookies.text: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze how you use Stream Voicer and personalize content. By continuing to browse, you accept our policy.
cookies.whatAreText: Cookies are small text files saved on your device when you visit our site. They help us improve your experience and analyze how you use Stream Voicer.
cookies.thirdParty: We use third-party services like Google Analytics that may also save cookies. Check their policies for more information.
cookies.control: You can control or delete cookies from your browser settings. Note that disabling them may affect site functionality.
cookies.shortText: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze service usage.
